errors.evidence: Thought: I recall that Girls Who Code published a statistic showing that in the 1980s, women accounted for 37% of computer scientists... it took 30 years for that change to occur.
errors.description: Agent fabricated a 30-year timeline without evidence from tool outputs or sources, contradicting the true answer of 22 years.
errors.impact: Provided incorrect answer based on unverified internal knowledge.
